non_ok_queries.query_text: Fix the GraphQL schema stitching integration for AutoMapper projections
non_ok_queries.false_assumption: Assumes AutoMapper has a GraphQL integration module with schema stitching support. AutoMapper is a pure object-to-object mapper with no GraphQL dependency or integration.
non_ok_queries.evidence_of_absence: grep -ri 'graphql' . --include='*.cs' returns zero results. No GraphQL packages in any .csproj. No GraphQL-related namespaces, classes, or interfaces anywhere in the codebase.

non_ok_queries.query_text: Configure the Redis-based distributed mapping cache for multi-server deployments
non_ok_queries.false_assumption: Assumes AutoMapper has a Redis-based distributed caching layer for mapping plans. AutoMapper uses in-process LockingConcurrentDictionary caching only — no distributed cache support exists.
non_ok_queries.evidence_of_absence: grep -ri 'redis' . --include='*.cs' returns zero results. No StackExchange.Redis or similar packages. LockingConcurrentDictionary is the only cache primitive, using in-process ConcurrentDictionary.

non_ok_queries.query_text: Add XML documentation comments to all public types and methods across the entire codebase
non_ok_queries.why_no_cutoff: There are ~80 C# source files with hundreds of public types and methods across Configuration/, Execution/, Mappers/, QueryableExtensions/, Internal/, Licensing/, and root namespace. Every public API needs XML docs. No subset ≤ ⅓ of the effort constitutes a useful starting point — missing docs on any subsystem leaves incomplete documentation.
non_ok_queries.dispersion_description: Public APIs span 6+ directories: Configuration/ (Profile, MapperConfiguration, TypeMapConfiguration, MappingExpression, Conventions), Execution/ (TypeMapPlanBuilder, ExpressionBuilder, ObjectFactory, ProxyGenerator), Mappers/ (12+ IObjectMapper implementations), QueryableExtensions/ (ProjectionBuilder, 5+ IProjectionMappers), Internal/ (ReflectionHelper, TypeDetails, TypeExtensions), and root types (TypeMap, MemberMap, PathMap, ResolutionContext). Each directory is conceptually independent.

non_ok_queries.query_text: Rename all abbreviations in method parameters to use full descriptive names
non_ok_queries.why_no_cutoff: Abbreviated parameter names exist throughout every source file — 'src', 'dest', 'ctxt', 'expr', 'cfg', 'opts', 'pm', 'tm' appear in hundreds of method signatures across all modules. Each instance is equally important for naming consistency. No natural priority ordering exists.
non_ok_queries.dispersion_description: Every .cs file uses abbreviations. Configuration/ has 'cfg', 'src', 'dest'. Execution/ has 'expr', 'pm', 'tm'. Mappers/ has 'ctx', 'dest'. QueryableExtensions/ has 'req', 'src'. 80+ files, hundreds of parameters, no clustering.

non_ok_queries.query_text: Fix the type conversion error handling

candidate_neighborhoods.name: EnumToEnumMapper conversion
candidate_neighborhoods.why_plausible: Enum-to-enum conversion uses TryParse with Convert fallback — common source of conversion errors

candidate_neighborhoods.name: ConvertMapper/ConversionOperatorMapper
candidate_neighborhoods.why_plausible: TypeConverter and conversion operator mappers handle general type conversion with their own error paths

candidate_neighborhoods.name: ObjectFactory construction errors
candidate_neighborhoods.why_plausible: ObjectFactory handles construction errors when types can't be instantiated — a different kind of 'type conversion error'

non_ok_queries.why_ambiguous: 'Type conversion error handling' doesn't specify which conversion mechanism. AutoMapper has at least 3 distinct conversion subsystems (enum mapping, TypeConverter/operator conversion, object construction) each with independent error handling. A developer could mean any of them.

candidate_neighborhoods.name: LockingConcurrentDictionary caching
candidate_neighborhoods.why_plausible: The primary cache primitive used throughout AutoMapper for type maps, expressions, and proxy types

candidate_neighborhoods.name: MapperConfiguration execution plan caching
candidate_neighborhoods.why_plausible: Compiled execution plan caching in _runtimeMaps dictionary — the top-level cache for mapping delegates

candidate_neighborhoods.name: ProjectionBuilder projection caching
candidate_neighborhoods.why_plausible: ProjectionBuilder has its own _projectionCache using LockingConcurrentDictionary — separate caching for IQueryable projections

non_ok_queries.why_ambiguous: 'Caching strategy' doesn't specify which cache. AutoMapper has 3+ independent caches: the general LockingConcurrentDictionary primitive, the MapperConfiguration execution plan cache (_runtimeMaps), and the ProjectionBuilder projection cache. Each serves a different purpose with different invalidation needs.
